body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.
**Phase context:** habit, automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, chunked behavior

Paper: Agency.
DOI: 10.1080/00221309.2024.2433277
Abstract: Agency is action aimed at goals selected by an agent. A deterministic world view leaves scant room for agency. To reconcile the arguments, we represent action as nested control systems, ranging from clearly deterministic to clearly volitional. Negative feedback minimizes deviations from setpoints (goals). Goals are determined by higher modules in a hierarchy of systems, ranging from gamma-efferent spindles through reflexes to operant responses; these last, and the larger system that contains the
